allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe manage.py shell -c "from feedback.models import Survey; qs = Survey.objects.filter\(improvement_tracking_enabled=False\); print\(f'Count: {qs.count\(\)}'\); [print\(f'  id={s.id} slug={s.slug}'\) for s in qs]")
